TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 7, Mokgweetsi Masisi , squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1961) mrhuw Botswana ta' misuw hya' ga Mokgweetsi Masisi, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2018 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Mokgweetsi Masisi minkahul sa Moshupa na Botswana. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1961 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun His Excellency President Dr. Mokgweetsi Eric Keabetswe Masisi
S.PHON: rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, mokɣweets~ɕi mas~ɕis~ɕi , s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw βots~ɕwana taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa mokɣweets~ɕi mas~ɕis~ɕi, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral mokɣweets~ɕi mas~ɕis~ɕi minkaħul s~ɕa mos~ɕħupa na βots~ɕwana. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨanpjuta ħknjun ħis~ɕ exʦ~ʨellenʦ~ʨj pres~ɕi*ent *r. mokɣweets~ɕi eriʦ~ʨ keaβets~ɕwe mas~ɕis~ɕi
S.FORM: ryax sa tay 21 nqu tay 7, Mokgweetsi Masisi , squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1961) mrhuw Botswana ta' misuw hya' ga Mokgweetsi Masisi, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 4 sa kawas 2018 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Mokgweetsi Masisi minkahul sa Moshupa na Botswana. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1961 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' canpyuta hknyun His Excellency President Dr. Mokgweetsi Eric Keabetswe Masisi
S.PHON: rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, mokɣweets~ɕi mas~ɕis~ɕi , s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw βots~ɕwana taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa mokɣweets~ɕi mas~ɕis~ɕi, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. qjanux na s~ɕraral mokɣweets~ɕi mas~ɕis~ɕi minkaħul s~ɕa mos~ɕħupa na βots~ɕwana. minqjanux ru qnxan ŋas~ɕal **** kawas~ɕ: ħitɣan. qnxan nja ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ ʦ~ʨanpjuta ħknjun ħis~ɕ exʦ~ʨellenʦ~ʨj pres~ɕi*ent *r. mokɣweets~ɕi eriʦ~ʨ keaβets~ɕwe mas~ɕis~ɕi
